name: @deml/design-system
description: Canonical DEML design tokens and shared component styles

scripts.build: sass src/tokens-export.scss dist/design-tokens.css --style=expanded --no-source-map --load-path=../../frontend/projects/viking-ui/src/styles && sass src/deml-components.scss dist/deml-components.css --style=expanded --no-source-map --load-path=../../frontend/projects/viking-ui/src/styles
